title: dryopteris filix-mas var. paleacea
intro: Dryopteris filix-mas var. paleacea is a variety of the autumn fern, a type of deciduous fern native to Europe and Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Dryopteris filix-mas var. paleacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
